name: skill handles a binary diff hunk by emitting a skip record rather than crashing
command: mkdir -p pr && printf 'diff --git a/img.png b/img.png\nBinary files a/img.png and b/img.png differ\n' > pr/diff.patch && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/pr-to-eval-dataset/extract.sh" --diff pr/diff.patch --emit dataset --out dataset.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"skipped":"binary"' dataset.jsonl && grep -q '"file":"img.png"' dataset.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
